steps.title: Spot the testing dynamic
steps.content: The passage shows that analysis can “support” your [blank]. The word “support” means confirming something initially uncertain — so the blank names an unproven assumption, not something established.

steps.title: Apply supposition to the blank
steps.content:
”Supposition” directly means an assumption or belief held without certain proof — precisely the kind of preliminary guess that corpus analysis would then support or refute.

The other choices fall short: scheme describes an organized plan or system, synopsis is a brief summary, and recognition denotes acknowledgment of something already established.

That is the correct answer.
